历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9799 → 10623 → 11199 → 14043 → 12327, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 14043, rebounding to about 12327 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1700 in the past two years. The 2025 baseline is about 12327. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's Physics Category was 38 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 48 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 46, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight contraction, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 51st, with rankings steadily rising in recent years (from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026), indicating continuously enhanced comprehensive strength. In the 2023 reputation cycle, a drop of 6211 in ranking for minor language majors was marked as slightly negative, but this was an anomaly at the major level, not a university-wide reputation event. Douyin popularity ranks 21st (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, high exposure on short video platforms, positively influencing application interest. Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding disciplinary advantages in marine and life sciences, highly related to Physics Category majors such as Marine Science, Biological Sciences, and Food Science and Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category enrollment majors, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended), strongly attracting candidates. The number of Chongqing Physics Category candidates increased continuously from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, estimated at about 136,895 in 2026, a slight decrease of about 1.85% from 2025, easing competition pressure slightly. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 446 in 2021 and 425 in 2025, generally stable with a slight decrease. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, with about 2.5% of its enrollment in Chongqing (15 out of 598 nationally in 2025), a cross-provincial enrollment, with no prominent regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12327, the slight enrollment contraction in 2026 (plan reduced by 2) causing ranking to move forward, the slight decrease in Chongqing Physics Category candidates easing competition, and the relatively hot Douyin attention slightly boosting interest, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is about 12069, with a range of 11569–12569.
